what_it_does: Records an image attachment entry for the design-assets channel, pointing to a specific icon asset via an image:// URI.
observations: File contains only YAML frontmatter metadata.
standouts: References a specific feature icon asset using an image:// URI.
Serves as a ledger-style attachment record in a channel memory system.
conventions: Attachment id uses the att- prefix.
Target uses a custom image:// URI scheme for design assets.
concerns: Contains no title, caption, description, or author context.
Target URI cannot be verified from this file alone.
No status, version, or resolution metadata for the asset.
notes: A minimal attachment ledger entry linking the design-assets channel to a filters feature icon image.
questions: Does the image://design-assets/icons/Feature_8_Filters URI resolve to an existing asset?
Why are there no descriptive or status fields for the attachment?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches what it does: it records an image attachment for a channel.
intention_signals: Track design asset attachments within a channel memory system by linking abstract channel entries to concrete image assets.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, idempotent attachment record that maps a channel to a specific image asset, supporting asset traceability and channel memory lookup.
summary_for_embedding: Markdown attachment ledger entry att-d222bd62 in the design-assets channel records an image target at image://design-assets/icons/Feature_8_Filters with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: Intended to catalog an image asset attachment for the design-assets channel.
